title: Ambassador joins archaeological dig near Ancient Shilo
description: U.S. Ambassador to Israel Mike Huckabee visited Ancient Shiloh, entered the excavation area and joined archaeologists searching for finds near the site where the Tabernacle once stood.

title: Van Cleef & Arpels unveils Ancient Egypt-inspired high jewellery collection
description: Retail Jeweller Van Cleef & Arpels unveils Ancient Egypt-inspired high jewellery collection French high jewellery house Van Cleef & Arpels has unveiled its latest high jewellery collection, Fascinating Egypt, inspired by the art, culture and mythology of Ancient Egypt. Van Cleef & Arpels unveils Ancient Egypt-inspired high jewellery collection Ruth Faulkner
